  FreeBSD src repository

  Modified files:        (Branch: RELENG_6)
    sys/compat/linux     linux_file.c 
  Log:
  MFC rev 1.97:
  The Linux unlink syscall uses a different errno value when trying to unlink
  a directory.

  Submitted by:   Marcin Cieslak <saper@SYSTEM.PL>

  Approved by:    re
